response.global_analysis: The video features a medley of two songs, 'Cosmic Wonderful Tour!' and 'Twinkle 4 You', followed by a dialogue segment. The audio phonetically matches the provided JSON reference lyrics. I am transcribing prominent visual text and including the dialogue at the end. Timestamps are strictly aligned with the vocal audio and visual cues.

いやさ……確かに良かったんだけど……
